## Skill Name

Proposed name (use `csp-` prefix): `csp-...`

## Description

One-sentence description following the format:
"Use when [trigger condition], [what the skill does], [why it matters]."

## Target Layer

- [ ] `csp-meta` (methodology)
- [ ] `csp-workflow` (project management)
- [ ] `csp-spec` (spec-driven development)
- [ ] `csp-patterns` (language/framework-specific)
- [ ] `csp-runtime` (runtime agents/commands)

## Trigger Conditions

What user actions or phrases should activate this skill?
- "..."
- "..."

## Example Usage

```
User: "..."
CSP: [what happens]
```

## Related Skills

List any existing CSP skills this relates to or complements.

## Implementation Notes

Any additional context, source material, or reference implementations.
